Greeting.when: Always — at the very start of call
Greeting.what: Agent must say the company/account name AND their own name
Greeting.good_example: Thank you for calling Customer Service Desk, my name is John
Greeting.bad_example: What's up? Hey what can I help you with?

User Authentication.what: Agent must verify User ID or First & Last Name AND get a callback number
User Authentication.good_example: Can I have your User ID or first and last name? Can I get a callback number?
User Authentication.bad_example: Who is this? Thanks what's up?

Offer Assistance.what: Agent must thank user, call them by name, and offer to help
Offer Assistance.good_example: Thank you for that information Lucas, how can I help you today?
Offer Assistance.bad_example: Silence... waiting for user to explain

Active Listening.what: Agent asks clarifying questions and confirms understanding
Active Listening.good_example: Just to confirm, you're saying the device is freezing when you open emails?

Resolution Provided.what: Agent provided a clear solution or next steps
Resolution Provided.good_example: I've resolved the issue. Your files are now on OneDrive.
Resolution Provided.bad_example: I don't know what's wrong, call back later.

Hold Protocol.what: Agent asked permission before hold and thanked after
Hold Protocol.good_example: May I place you on a brief hold? ... Thank you for holding.
Hold Protocol.bad_example: Hold on. [places on hold with no warning]

Escalation Handling.what: Agent correctly escalated or set expectations for follow-up
Escalation Handling.good_example: I'll escalate this. You can expect a call within 24 hours.
Escalation Handling.bad_example: I can't help you with that. Goodbye.

Professional Tone.what: Agent maintained calm, professional, empathetic tone
Professional Tone.good_example: I completely understand how frustrating that must be.

Clear Explanation.what: Agent explained steps in simple, clear language
Clear Explanation.good_example: Click the OneDrive icon, then right-click and select Settings.
Clear Explanation.bad_example: Just do the thing with the sync folder config.

Issue Confirmation.what: Agent confirmed resolution and asked if anything else needed
Issue Confirmation.good_example: Is there anything else I can help you with today?

Professional Farewell.when: At the very end of the call
Professional Farewell.what: Agent thanked customer and gave a professional goodbye
Professional Farewell.good_example: Thank you for calling, have a great day!

Recap Provided.what: Agent briefly summarized what was done during the call
Recap Provided.good_example: Today I helped you recover your BitLocker key and free up C drive space.
